name: NAD and Redox Restoration Trial-Horizon Surveillance

scope.question: Do current MIB-626 COVID/AKI registry, same-window publication, or broader NAD/redox registry checks change the NAD and Redox Restoration outlook or clear stale local trial-watch metadata?

summary: Ran a focused NAD and Redox Restoration surveillance pass to reconcile the final open stale trial-watch record, MIB-626 COVID-19 acute kidney injury NCT05038488. ClinicalTrials.gov still lists NCT05038488 as completed with no registry results section, 42 actual participants, actual primary and study completion on August 17, 2023, and last update posted August 27, 2024. The peer-reviewed PMID 40746868 result remains the public evidence source, so the local study was refreshed as a posted-result record rather than an open no-results watch item. Direct ClinicalTrials.gov checks for the scoped NAD/redox registry set found no newly posted registry result or material status change. Same-window PubMed searches found review, biomarker, reproductive-aging, placental, Alzheimer bioenergetic, and wrong-scope context rather than a new MIB-626, NAD-precursor, GlyNAC, or MitoQ human aging result. No outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, source, finding, activity, bundle, or coverage assessment update is warranted.

materiality_decision.rationale: The stale NCT05038488 item was a local trial-details metadata gap, not a field delta. Current registry checks show no posted registry result and no evidence beyond the already represented peer-reviewed result. The public study metadata was refreshed only to record the June 14 registry check, structured completion timing, and posted-result status from the existing evidence layer.

search_log.summary: Scoped report contained 21 registry-linked NAD and Redox Restoration studies, 1 missing trial-detail record, 9 stale or missing registry checks, and 1 open stale watch item. The open stale item was MIB-626 COVID-19 acute kidney injury NCT05038488.

NCT05038488 remains completed with hasResults=false, 42 actual participants, actual primary and study completion on August 17, 2023, and last update posted August 27, 2024. The other direct NAD/redox registry checks showed no newly posted registry result or material status change versus the June 8 coverage-repair pass.

The UMIN registry record attached to the older-men NMN trial was not machine-verified in this pass. The published PMID 35927255 result remains represented locally, so the UMIN item remains a registry-check limitation rather than an open no-results watch item.

The MIB-626/NAD query returned already represented or boundary records, including recruiting diabetic kidney disease NCT05759468 and not-yet-recruiting Down syndrome/Alzheimer disease NAD augmentation NCT07278492. No new result-bearing aging-relevant MIB-626 registry was found.

search_log.query: (MIB-626 OR NCT05038488 OR nicotinamide mononucleotide OR NMN OR NAD) AND (COVID OR acute kidney injury OR AKI OR aging OR older) AND 2026/06/08:2026/06/14[edat]
search_log.summary: Returned 9 records. They were review, reproductive-aging, skin/antiaging, placental metabolism, Alzheimer bioenergetic, SIRT1, iScience neuronal metabolism, or wrong-scope context rather than a new result-bearing MIB-626 or NAD/redox human aging source.
Returned the already represented MIB-626 human records: PMID 40746868, PMID 36740954, and PMID 35182418. No new linked NCT05038488 publication was found.

search_log.query: MIB-626 NCT05038488 results COVID acute kidney injury; MIB-626 COVID-19 acute kidney injury trial results 2026; NCT05038488 MIB-626 trial results
search_log.summary: Search results surfaced ClinicalTrials.gov, the PubMed/PMC/FASEB BioAdvances result, trial mirrors, and non-primary summaries. No current sponsor, registry, or publication page reported a new result beyond PMID 40746868.

trial_watch_checks.summary: The MIB-626 COVID/AKI registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 40746868 result remains the public evidence source, so local metadata was refreshed as posted-result context rather than an open no-results watch item.
The MIB-626 plus exercise phase 2 registry remains completed with no posted registry results.
The MIB-626 diabetic kidney disease registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The NADage NR frailty registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The older-veterans NR muscle registry remains active-not-recruiting with no posted results.
The NR MCI/Alzheimer bioenergetics registry remains active-not-recruiting with no posted results.
The NR arterial-stiffness registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The NR plus exercise healthy-longevity registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The prediabetic postmenopausal-women NMN registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 33888596 result remains the public evidence source.
The aged-men NR skeletal-muscle registry remains unknown status with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 31412242 result remains the public evidence source.
The obese insulin-resistant men's NR registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 31710095 result remains the public evidence source.
The healthy middle-aged and older-adult NR registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 29599478 result remains the public evidence source.
The GlyNAC aging-hallmarks registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 35975308 result remains the public evidence source.
The GlyNAC/PRUVIN dose-ranging registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 35821844 result remains the public evidence source.
The older-adult MitoQ vascular-function registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 29661838 result remains the public evidence source.
The NMN middle-aged and elderly registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The NMN exercise-tolerance older-adult registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The MitoQ age-related vascular dysfunction registry remains active-not-recruiting with no posted results.
The Mito-Frail MitoQ registry remains recruiting with no posted results.
The MitoQ vascular oxidative-stress registry remains completed with no posted results.
The UMIN record attached to the older-men NMN trial was not machine-verified in this pass. The published PMID 35927255 result remains the public evidence source.

excluded_sources.title: NAD Augmentation to Prevent or Reverse Alzheimer's Disease in People With Down Syndrome
excluded_sources.reason: Not-yet-recruiting MIB-626/NAD augmentation registry in Down syndrome and Alzheimer disease context, last updated December 12, 2025, with no posted results. It is disease-boundary watch context, not a same-window aging result.

excluded_sources.title: Placental nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide modulates the timing of labor.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window NAD biology paper in placental timing of labor, not aging, MIB-626, or NAD/redox restoration intervention evidence.

excluded_sources.title: Mitochondrial bioenergetic signatures differentiate asymptomatic from symptomatic Alzheimer's disease.
excluded_sources.reason: Alzheimer bioenergetics context, not a NAD/redox intervention result.

excluded_sources.title: Nutritional Regulation of Ovarian Bioenergetics: Implications for Reproductive Aging and Female Infertility.
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level reproductive-aging bioenergetics context, not a result-bearing NAD/redox intervention source.

excluded_sources.title: Skin Cancer Prevention and Antiaging: Role of Nicotinamide.
excluded_sources.reason: Nicotinamide skin cancer and antiaging review context, not one of the scoped NAD/redox restoration intervention branches.

excluded_sources.title: Redox bioenergetics of neuronal senescence in Alzheimer's disease.
excluded_sources.reason: Review context for redox bioenergetics in Alzheimer disease, not a human intervention result.

excluded_sources.reference: MIB-626 NCT05038488 web mirrors and non-primary summaries
excluded_sources.title: MIB-626 COVID/AKI trial mirrors and summaries
excluded_sources.reason: Search returned ClinicalTrials.gov, PubMed/PMC/FASEB BioAdvances pages, trial mirrors, and non-primary summaries of the already represented PMID 40746868 result; none added new primary evidence.

notes: This pass was selected manually after the global trial-watch audit showed one remaining open stale watch item.
The delta window is anchored to the 2026-06-08 NAD and Redox Restoration coverage repair and the 2026-06-09 public update.
The UMIN000036321 registry remains unrefreshed because it was not machine-verified; it is not an open watch item because the peer-reviewed result is already represented locally.
No coverage assessment update is needed because the June 8 coverage repair already captured the MIB-626 disease-boundary result and broader NAD/redox no-results registry watchlist.
next_actions: Continue ordinary surveillance for posted NR, NMN, MIB-626, GlyNAC, MitoQ, and NAD/redox registry results, especially the active or completed no-results records already represented in the public watchlist.

Create a public bundle only if future evidence changes stage, evidence weight, momentum, blockers, safety, durability, human target engagement, functional outcomes, or the NAD/redox translation boundary.
